title: ConfirmDialog
description: Imperative confirmation dialog. Mount the <ConfirmDialog /> host once near the root and call useConfirm().confirm(\{...\}) from any component to get a Promise<boolean>.

playground.title: Continue with this action?
playground.description: Component preview with the current playground settings.

basic.title: Basic confirmation
basic.desc: Passing just a string gives you a minimal yes/no dialog.

danger.title: Destructive action
danger.desc: For deletions and irreversible operations, use color='danger' with an explicit confirmLabel.

async.title: Async confirm
async.desc: confirm() returns Promise<boolean>: perfect for chaining await + API calls.

custom.title: Custom labels
custom.desc: Override confirmLabel and cancelLabel so the button reflects the exact action.

props.radius: Default radius for confirmations that don't specify one.
